case_title: SMITH, REGINALD VS LOPEZ, JOHN (MGR B OF A BLDG) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SMITH, REGINALD AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JOHN (MGR B OF A BLDG) BANK OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS-HEARING SET.
MOTION HEARING ON FEE WAIVER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, REGINALD HEARING SET FOR MAY-18-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION HEARING ON FEE WAIVER OF MAY-18-2007, GRANTED
PLTF'S MOTION FOR WAIVER OF FEES, GRANTED. PAYMENTS OF ALL FEES AND COSTS LISTED IN CRC 3.61 IS WAIVED.
PLAINTIFF FILED DECLARATION STATING THAT DEFENDANT WAS NOT SERVED AND REQUESTED TO RESET THE TRIAL DATE.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-16-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-15-2007 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JOHN (MGR B OF A BLDG)
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO LANCE PURVIS
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO FERDINANDGONZALEZ
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO STEVEN WILLIAMS 1455 MARKET ST, 9TH FLR SF CA
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CHARLES BOYD
PLAINTIFF FILED PROOF OF SERVICE OF SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA AS TO CHARLES BOYD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, REGINALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JOHN (MGR B OF A BLDG) BANK OF AMERICA THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF ALTHOUGH APPARENTLY ENTITLED TO USE THE PASSENGER LOADING AREA AT THE TIME OF THE SUBJECT INCIDENT--DID NOT ESTABLISH ANY RECOVERABLE DAMAGES RESULTING FROM DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS. DEFENDANT JOHN LOPEZ DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, INCORRECTLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
